tools.name: eslint
tools.fix_command: pnpm --filter=web run lint:fix && pnpm --filter=worker run lint:fix && pnpm --filter=@langfuse/shared run lint:fix && pnpm --filter=@langfuse/ee run lint:fix

linting.notes: ESLint is run via turbo across all workspace packages. Prettier uses experimental CLI. Codespell runs in CI via GitHub Actions.

testing.run_single_file: pnpm --filter=web run test {file} OR pnpm --filter=worker run test {file}
testing.run_single_test: pnpm --filter=web run test -t '{test_name}' OR pnpm --filter=worker run test {test_name}
testing.mock_patterns: Uses MSW (Mock Service Worker) in worker package, Jest mocks in web package
testing.notes: Web tests use Jest with 3 projects: server, client, e2e-server. Worker tests use Vitest. E2E tests use Playwright. All integration tests require full infrastructure stack (Postgres 12/15, Redis, ClickHouse, Minio). CI runs tests in matrix across Node 24, Postgres 12/15, and 3 deployment modes (default, azure, redis-cluster) with 3 shards for web tests.

gating_checks.name: tests-web
gating_checks.command: npx cross-env NODE_OPTIONS='--no-experimental-require-module' npx dotenv -e ../.env.test -e ../.env -- npx jest --verbose --runInBand --detectOpenHandles --selectProjects server --shard={shard}/3

gating_checks.name: test-docker-build
gating_checks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.build.yml build && docker compose up -d --wait

gating_checks.name: validate-pr-title
gating_checks.command: Validates PR title follows conventional commits (feat|fix|docs|style|refactor|perf|test|build|ci|chore|revert|security)

advisory_checks.name: snyk-web
advisory_checks.command: Snyk security scan for web package

advisory_checks.name: snyk-worker
advisory_checks.command: Snyk security scan for worker package

ci.notes: Tests run in matrix across Node 24, Postgres 12/15, and 3 deploy modes. Web tests are sharded 3 ways. All checks must pass for merge. Infrastructure is spun up via docker-compose in CI.

build.notes: Uses pnpm workspaces with Turborepo for orchestration. Build depends on db:generate (Prisma client generation). Supports turbo caching. Node.js 24.6.0 required.

conventions.test_naming: Jest: describe/it blocks. Vitest: describe/it or test() blocks.
conventions.import_style: ESM with absolute imports via tsconfig paths. Barrel exports from @langfuse/shared and @langfuse/ee.
conventions.notes: Monorepo with workspace protocol (workspace:*) for internal dependencies. Uses dotenv-cli for environment variables. Conventional commits required for PRs.

lint_commands.notes: SUCCESS: All 4 packages linted successfully in 1m4s
SUCCESS: All matched files use Prettier code style

test_commands.notes: Command valid but requires infrastructure: Postgres, Redis, ClickHouse, Minio. Tests fail with 'connect ECONNREFUSED' errors.
Vitest runs but fails connecting to Redis (127.0.0.1:6379) and Postgres (localhost:5432)
Jest runs, some unit tests pass, integration tests fail without database

container_recipe.test_single_test: pnpm --filter=web run test -t '{test_name}' OR pnpm --filter=worker run test {test_name}
container_recipe.notes: Build requires pnpm --filter=@langfuse/shared run build first to generate shared package dist. Typecheck depends on db:generate (Prisma). Full test suite requires docker-compose infrastructure.

validation.summary: install OK, lint OK, format OK, typecheck OK, build OK (3m58s), tests REQUIRE_INFRASTRUCTURE (Redis, Postgres, ClickHouse)

gaps: Tests cannot run without full infrastructure stack (Postgres, Redis, ClickHouse, Minio)
E2E tests require built application and database seeding
LLM connection tests require external API keys (OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure, Bedrock, VertexAI)
Docker build test requires multi-stage Docker build with all dependencies
Some tests depend on specific data fixtures from db:seed or db:seed:examples
